data.title: ElectronX selects Connamara Technologies' EP3 platform for energy exchange, marking first U.S.-regulated direct-access electricity with Connamara's technology.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on October 16, 2025, Connamara Technologies, a prominent supplier of comprehensive exchange and clearinghouse technology, has revealed that its EP3 platform has been chosen by ElectronX for facilitating the inaugural U.S.-regulated, direct-access electricity service.

data.title: ManpowerGroup's 3rd quarter 2025 results: Revenues of $4.6 billion (2% reported, -2% constant currency, 1% organic CC).
data.description: In the most recent quarter, revenue stood at $4.6 billion, showing a 2% increase as reported but a 2% decrease in constant currency (CC) with 1% growth in organic CC. While North America and Europe demonstrated sustained performance, Latin America and Asia Pacific regions saw strong demand. Revenue for this quarter experienced a year-over-year increase compared to the preceding quarter, indicating ongoing stabilization and promising growth in various regions.

data.title: Vybz Kartel headlines Houston concert with Olamide, Diamond Platnumz, Kes. First-ever performance in Houston. A historical event in the Afro-Caribbean music scene. Presented by Jay Upscale, top Caribbean promoter.
data.description: On October 31, 2025, fans in Houston can look forward to Vybz Kartel's inaugural performance in the city. The event, presented by Jay Upscale, a prominent Caribbean promoter from New York, will showcase the dancehall icon along with a diverse lineup of international artists. Scheduled to take place on October 16, 2025, this highly anticipated show is set to attract a large audience eager to experience Vybz Kartel's live performance.

data.title: XCharge NA wins "Battery Charging Technology Solution of the Year" in 2025 AutoTech Breakthrough Awards with GridLink. Nasdaq: XCH.
data.description: XCharge North America, the North American branch of XCHG Limited (Nasdaq: XCH), a provider of high-power EV charging and battery-integrated solutions aimed at bolstering the North American electrical grid, revealed that GridLink has won the prestigious title of "Battery Charging Technology Solution of the Year." This recognition was awarded in the sixth edition of the AutoTech Breakthrough Awards program by AutoTech Breakthrough, a renowned market intelligence firm. GridLink stands out as a cutting-edge technology in the sector, showcasing the innovation and excellence of XCharge NA in the industry.

data.title: Doron Therapeutics starts Phase 3 study on MOTYS (PTP-001) for knee osteoarthritis, aiming for 12-month benefits.Character count: 99
data.description: A global Phase 3 study conducted in Chapel Hill, N.C. is assessing the effectiveness of MOTYS injection in improving pain and function over a 12-month period. The trial, led by Alessandra Pavesio, aims to provide insights into the long-term benefits of the treatment.

data.title: Boliden AB's AGM introduces nomination committee with members appointed by top 3 shareholders.
data.description: On October 16th, 2025, in Stockholm, Boliden AB announced that in April 2025, during its Annual General Meeting, new guidelines were approved for selecting the Nomination Committee. As per the updated instructions, the Nomination Committee of the company will now include representatives chosen by the top three shareholders.

data.title: Foretellix's Foretify tool named "Autonomous Vehicle Innovation of the Year." Recognized for enabling safe AVs.
data.description: Foretellix, a prominent company in enabling safe autonomous vehicles, was recently honored with the "Autonomous Vehicle Innovation of the Year" award as part of the Annual AutoTech Breakthrough Awards program. The recognition was announced on October 16, 2025, in both SUNNYVALE, Calif. and TEL AVIV, Israel. This prestigious award acknowledges Foretellix's cutting-edge contributions to the development of safe autonomous vehicles. The company's innovative approach has not only garnered industry attention but has also solidified its position as a leader in the field.

data.title: Bitcoin retail interest wanes in ‘bear market’ with low Google search interest and crypto sentiment index back to “fear.”
data.description: Even though Bitcoin has reached all-time highs and experienced volatility, search interest for the cryptocurrency on Google has stayed low. The crypto sentiment index has dropped back to a level indicating "fear" among investors.

data.title: The Mobility House secures Sourcewell contract for EV charging infrastructure. Offers services to US and Canada fleets.
data.description: The Mobility House, a top provider of fleet electrification solutions globally, has secured a Sourcewell cooperative purchasing contract for electric vehicle chargers, charge management software, and consulting services. This contract encompasses fleet operators in the United States and Canada, offering pre-negotiated pricing for public agencies including schools, municipalities, and transit agencies. Sourcewell facilitates access to vetted vendors for various solutions, benefiting a wide range of organizations in North America.

data.title: Blackline Safety's EXO 8 receives 2025 Firehouse Innovation Award in Calgary, Canada. #BLN #TSX
data.description: A Canadian city located in Calgary has reported that Blackline Safety, a company in the area, has secured the prestigious 2025 Firehouse Innovation Award for their innovative product, the EXO 8. The award signifies the recognition of the product's groundbreaking features and technology. This achievement highlights the exceptional performance and capabilities of the EXO 8 in the market. This recognition is a testament to the dedication and commitment of Blackline Safety to deliver cutting-edge solutions for safety and security.

data.title: Zitro impresses at G2E Las Vegas 2025 with biggest showcase yet, unveiling premium cabinet FANTASY.
data.description: Luxembourg, October 16, 2025 - Zitro made a major announcement at G2E Las Vegas 2025 by revealing FANTASY, their latest premium cabinet. This unveiling was highly anticipated by many and exceeded expectations. FANTASY is the pinnacle of the company's hardware offerings, delivering a unique experience that seamlessly integrates design, technology, and emotion.
